reasoning: The tool called (get_traditional_arts with no filters) returns 183 records, but the cross_program_advisory's featured_cluster fires with exactly the right canonical entities for regional kabuki: Konpira Kabuki (Kotohira/Kagawa), Uchiko-za (Ehime), Yachiyoza (Yamaga/Kumamoto), and Korakukan (Kosaka/Akita) — all outside Tokyo and Kyoto. The 183-item unfiltered items list is noisy but the advisory block is highly targeted. Expression quality is slightly reduced by the bulk unfiltered items dominating the response.
